errors.overview: Failed to load dashboard overview. Check /api/v1/dashboard/overview.

help.personnel_overview: Personnel is available in the left sidebar. The list supports search, filters, and sorting; admins can add, edit, delete, and restore records.
help.personnel_details: Opening a row shows the Personnel card with profile fields, photo upload, competencies, training with expiry warnings and reminder offsets, and notes.
help.personnel_schedule: The yearly planner is a dedicated Personnel screen with a day matrix, bulk status fill, event overlays, and a right-hand analytics panel.
help.overview: The overview is a read-only dashboard with KPI cards, charts, and summary tables. It provides a snapshot of the system and does not allow editing records directly.
help.equipmentWarehouseItems: This table lists warehouse stock items. Use search, filters, and sorting to find positions quickly. Add, edit, delete, and restore actions are available.
help.equipmentWarehouseItemsSecondary: Movement actions such as inbound and transfer are initiated from this area.
help.equipmentCabinetItems: Cabinet items show equipment stored in cabinets. Use the same list tools: search, filters, sorting, and actions to add, edit, delete, or restore entries.
help.cabinets: The cabinets list lets you manage cabinet records. Use add/edit/delete/restore actions and open a cabinet to view its composition.
help.cabinetComposition: Cabinet composition is a dedicated view for the cabinet structure and items. It is a focused area for cabinet details and composition-related actions.
help.engineering: Engineering includes IO Signals and DCL. These screens manage signals, connections, and related definitions using add/edit/delete/restore actions.
help.engineeringSecondary: I/O Signals now includes Data type, Equipment, and Connection point fields. Data types and field equipment are selected from dictionary trees, and Measurement type is no longer used.
help.networkMap: Network Topology is a graphical React Flow editor for building and reviewing the network landscape with inventory-backed nodes, custom links, validation, and path tracing.
help.networkMapSecondary: The screen supports read-only and edit modes based on role, loads installed network-capable equipment from EQM/IPAM, and stores the topology document on the server.
help.main_equipment: The Main equipment dictionary is a hierarchical tree with unlimited depth. Node level is calculated automatically from the selected parent.
help.field_equipments: The Field equipment dictionary is a hierarchical tree. It supports creating root and child nodes, editing, soft delete, and restore.
help.data_types: The Data types dictionary is a tree. You can create root and child nodes, edit name, parent, and tooltip. Tooltip is shown on hover over the node name and may be empty.
help.dictionaries: Dictionaries include Warehouses, Manufacturers, Nomenclature, Locations, Main equipment, and Equipment Categories. Records can be viewed, added, edited, deleted, and restored. Main equipment is stored as a tree.
help.admin: Admin contains Users, Sessions, and Audit Logs. Access is limited to the admin role.
